reviews.review_title: Best app if you care about exploring
reviews.review_description: I have used just about any app out there that involves traveling and uses google map data, this is by far the best, and most intuitive. I come back to this every night to explore the world and the map.  "Traveling" with my family (who lives in another continent) is so fun that I look forward to it every day. Others complain about the inability to create an avatar, but they did not mention how well the Avatar system works in group travel. When I travel with someone, my arm /controller motion and lip motion synchronize with my avatar and I can freely place my friend's avatar wherever I want; and not only that, our spatial relationship on the street will always follow wherever I placed my friend relative to myself.  The developers are really that thoughtful.  I also love the big map, and that you can swing it closer or further away depending on how large you want it. All the functions available on the left controller, including the instantly available smaller map while you are busy walking and don't want look at the big map, are so useful. You can go back to old google street maps and see how some places once were. You can easily save locations.  Users uploaded street views are included and I am very thankful especially for locations where Google has no access. All in all, if you care about traveling and map exploration, this is the one to get.
The app hasn't been updated for months; it's been abandoned. There's a bug that prevents you from changing your avatar. Many have reported this, but the developers don't care!

reviews.review_title: Amazing app! Not perfect but my favorite
reviews.review_description: This application isn't perfect some blue dots are low res but you have an easy interface, with a small community of people who are great! It's alot better then the other competitors with low res 3d flying lol

Avatars don't work, cannot play with friends. They are likely aware of this issue yet they refuse to fix it. Completely abandoned app. Not worth it, do not buy if you care about the social experience.

The only reason we purchased the Meta was so we could get this app. And so far its a slide show. THATS IT!!!!  No narrative, have no idea where you are. You search for something and it just plops you somewhere in that country. Please tell me if I'm missing something

Edit. 2026 it doesn't work anymore. No social, saying there's an issue with my avatar and Wont let me change it.  
This app is the main reason I keep coming back to my oculus honestly. I have spent many hours exploring, trying to memorize directions in places that someday I hope I'll have the opportunity to go to. This is an incredible idea, and it's one that I appreciate very much. While I was in the marine corps I was privileged to get to travel to some cool places and now that I'm out this is the next best thing for me to see those things again. This is my favorite app and I'd definitely recommend! If you're interested in seeing the world but can't afford the travel just yet. Try this out, use it as a tool to help know where you'd like to go, and how you'd like to see it.
Some places I'd recommend visiting are:

Dili, Timor leste is an cool city on an island north of Darwin Australia. 

Kakadu, NT Australia
Jim Jim falls specifically is amazing 

Singapore, Universal studios
Has an entire Shrek town and it's hilarious to see

Uluru, NT Australia 
Australian indigenous holy site

Subic bay Freeport zone, near olongapo 
In the Philippines. Used to be a U.S. Navy base, turned into a city.

Dubai, United Arab Emerites 

The many small islands in the Middle of the Atlantic Ocean that most people have never even heard of are amazing to see.

Key west, Florida USA is cool too 

Many cool places in Africa from Egypt to South Africa

American Samoa is an American territory so if you're American you don't need a passport to go ! And it's somewhat close to New Zealand.

This game/app offers an incredible opportunity to see things you have never seen before. As well as giving you a tool to use for future travel plans. 

Somethings I'd love to see added are:

-The option to zoom in even if just a little so I can read signs better while exploring

-the ability to add way points and create travel routes in an area so I could stick to a specific path without having to constantly check my map 

-the ability to pin specific locations on your world map that can be saved, if you could just add it from the favorite locations that would be awesome, especially if you were able to turn it on and off so if wouldn't clutter.

Thank you again for this game.
Why won't it let me change avatar

I can spend hours on this app exploring the world.  I like to "get lost" on the streets and trails of the world. I like being able to go back in time at most  locations and see hiw things have changed. This app helps me relax, as there is no objective but to explore.....
I love how I can go back in time and see what places looked like, this is one of my favorite apps

I enter Cayman Islands in the search bar, several locations pull up. I click on one and it consistently opens a location and map of Mexico. Extremely frustrating to use, having to click on the trigger to move to the next app instead of moving ahead while holding the toggle or trigger.
This app sucks. It's definitely not worth paying any money for it.

Probably my fav app. I loooove when people make trails and I can follow them. Love the info about sites 
  Some suggestions: 
The small selection of available avatars is the wokest collection of people possible outside of a free Palestine rally. There are no young white men without a beard for example. My husband cannot find even a remote lookalike. 
Can you make an option to filter out really bad resolution photos?
Add a Google Translate feature to read signs?

reviews.review_title: Street view doesn't work for some places
reviews.review_description: Awesome for exploring North America, Europe and Asia, but I have not been able to load street view data for several countries (Jamaica, El Salvador, Barbados). It's disappointing, because it's a great app otherwise.

Something strange happens when I try to save content. A pop up message shows up stating that I have not created a Avatar. Wander uses the new Meta Avatar system, would you like to create one now? If not, you will be assigned a default Avatar. Problem is that I had all ready created one a few years ago. So i go ahead and click to create a new one and i select the first male left hand corner, but I notised that box of selections indicates " You are using the old Avatar group selection.
Then it continues in a constant loop? It is down right annoying. Problem seems to have started with the latest App update! Please fix

I got 2 Quests for family so they can join me in Wander. Also gifted a few friends Wander as well. It helps me so much with anxiety and depression. I enjoy traveling the world from my living room. You can escape your crazy life and everything else by exploring the world. It’s a simple yet incredible app. I want to make a suggestion: I would love to see there be a camera added. So we could have some fun taking pictures. It could be as simple or as complex as you can make it. But to take pics with a camera overlay (instead of screen shots) would be so fun. 

Ps. Im pretty sure I’m the apps biggest fan thanks for the fun over the years

Wander is the greatest app ever, especially now that it's been FIXED!
 It’s not a game, it’s a magic carpet that allows you to travel around the world in a wonderful educational experience. It allows you to hook not only into Google Street Maps 360° but also to a vast library of user uploaded content of 360° photos that have been submitted from users around the world. You can travel with your friends, or make new ones, and talk with them in a real interactive experience. You can take photos and you can keep records of where you’ve been or where you want to go to using a built-in file system within the program. There are built in interactive descriptions or suggestions about where to go and collections of suggestions where to go around the world from the North Pole to Antarctica, with some underwater footage for good measure. If you love to travel or want to scope out a new place to go this app is for you!
I used to love this app. I used it to visit places before I travel but lately I can’t view the user generated content. It no longer takes me to the blue dot user content. It’s useless.

Your in 2022 and a flick of a button your back in 2008,And you can scroll through the years and see the changes.
It would be great if they could use older pictures and place them in the time line of a place.
I would own a quest headset just so I can own  this app .. it has proven itself over and over again when planning my holidays or visiting a new location .. well done 👍
Don't bother. Doesn't update to the present

reviews.review_title: Loved this app... when it worked
reviews.review_description:
Read other negative reviews before purchasing! 

I've had this app for years and it seems within the past year its been full of bugs left and right. Not sure if developers are neglecting it or what. Constantly glitching. Will work perfectly, then randomly stop for days.. weeks. Stays stuck in one location, click anywhere it just spins, street views not loading etc. 
Really wish a similar, upgraded version of this app would be developed by someone else. I'd uninstall and happily give them my money. Awesome concept! Unfortunately it's just not the same anymore

This is fantastic!  First I looked at the place where I grew up and immediately after that I looked directly at the FC Chelsea stadium...I didn't expect this.  Seriously fantastic.  You can explore the whole world without leaving your bedroom 😀 it is not humanly possible to see all the places you want to see in the world...🤯🥳 here you can for $10.  Great 🥰 And it looks like the application is working again as it did in the beginning. Which is very positive!

reviews.review_title: One of the best apps on Meta Quest
reviews.review_description:
Reviews stating this app does not work are not true as of October 21, 2025. This app works perfectly with Meta Quest 3 and 2. 

There are several other apps that let you experience Google Street View, but none offer just the essential features you need this easily.

My favorite feature is the social feature. Wander's social feature allows one of the participants to act as a guide and show others around various places.

At that time, participants do not need to operate the controller. This is truly remarkable, a feature not found in other apps.

In other words, simply placing a VR headset on bedridden elderly people in hospitals or at home allows a guide to take them on a world tour or revisit places of memory together. It doesn't burden them with difficult operations of Quest.

This is an incredibly, incredibly valuable feature for us. We sincerely thank you for creating such an outstanding app, maintaining it, and offering it at such an affordable price with low requirements. Thank you so much!

reviews.review_title: All things considered, worst app ever!!!
reviews.review_description: Used to be an AMAZING app. But as of 2025, it does not work. So many glitches. The worst of which is as soon as you try to put the cursor on the screen to zoom in it goes bezerk and zooms out to the max. So you can't view anything you haven't already bookmarked. This is the most annoying app in the history of the entire internet.
Great for the older generation sit and enjoy.

Has been been an incredible app but unfortunately no longer works. You can explore for a few clicks and then the maps/street view fail to load and get in a state essentially frozen (but can move around partially loaded view). I assume this is due to a device update. Please fix.

Will update to 5 stars once functioning again.
Save your money and use Google earth
What is annoying at locations is that you see Google stamps everywhere.  It destroys real experience. Loading a sceneary must be faster. 3 stars for the effort .

reviews.review_title: Excellent way to travel the world
reviews.review_description: Uses Google Streetview imagery but they wrap around you (unlike looking at them on a monitor) so it feels like you're right there, which is why I got it. Not disappointed at all!

I absolutely love this app. I am very disappointed that user content (blue dots) have either stopped working or have been disabled by  Parkline/Rendever. The blue dots content is what really made the app enjoyable. What is even more disappointing, is that Parkline/Rendever, obviously seeing all of the reviews, has chosen to just ignore the issue, as well as all users who purchased the app. Please fix the issue or reimburse everyone's money. Thank you.

reviews.review_title: Love the app, but not new interface.
reviews.review_description:
August 2025

Not sure what happened recently, but the app crashes every time I try to join a private group created by my wife. But on Quest 3, apps up to date and headsets up to date.

Please help!

April 2021 update 2

Following the second update, the user interface on the secondary controller is much easier to access without having to twist your wrist. This will be a huge help for anyone with arthritis.

The addition of “Add Favorites” to the main map is also much appreciated.

The one handed mode is a nice addition and is now so close to perfect, lacking only the ability to move forward and back with the thumb-stick, which is usually on the secondary controller.

Thank you so much for your swift responses to the previous issues. I have nothing but the greatest respect for your fast acting developers!


Thanks again for an amazing app, that I have been using with my wife, dad, and sister to travel the world, even though we are over 3 thousand miles apart.

This is my absolute favorite app. It is truly the best travel app available anywhere. It has the regular pass of Google maps but it also has little blue dots for user uploaded content which is just amazing. ￼I love to visit Versailles and walk all around virtually when I need my Versailles fix. My favorite part is the user uploaded content because you can see your favorite places throughout all different seasons and areas that are off of the road, like in the gardens and in other picturesque places. For a while, the little blue dots of user uploaded content had been disabled, and I was completely heartbroken. I logged in today and they worked once again and I am completely over the moon!

reviews.review_title: User uploaded content is not working
reviews.review_description: I love this app but recently when I click on user uploaded content nothing happens. I tried deleting the app and reinstalling but that did not fix the issue. I can see the blue dots for the user uploaded content but when I click on them it just spins and does not open the image.

Thanks for fixing all the issues!
Loadtimes are fast and all the user content is accessible again. Took a long time to get patched and though I have downloaded other wander-like apps in the meantime, this is still my favorite.
Now I can jump back into my favorite passtime every night! Appreciate you!

Absolutely fantastic app, I love wandering around Street View in VR. Both great entertainment and a great resource. I use it to visit places before I go and get a feel for the area and scout out new places to visit. Going to places you've already been is super fun as well, a nice nostalgia hit, and seeing places you'll never get the chance to go to is amazing. I highly recommend this, it's provided me with hours and hours of fun and it's been well worth the price!
UPDATE 7/1/25-User uploaded content is working again so I've changed it back to 5 stars! Can't recommend this app highly enough, absolutely worth the price!
One of the coolest apps I've seen in awhile.  Great for remembering places you've been or planning for where you're going.  Nicely done Thank you. 🙏 - Meta Quest 3 user
Brilliant love it

love the app but it no longer allows me to open images when clicking on the blue dots. I reported it and was given a lot of work to try like removing the app, re-adding, resets etc that resulted in me having to do a full factory reset. Still didn’t work. So frustrating as it’s obviously a bug with the app as so many people are reporting same problem and still being asked to do factory resets to no avail
I bought this app but now it doesn’t work

This app is absolutely amazing! It’s like a VR version of Google Maps, but it offers so much more. Such as the ability to go to any location and visit. It also has the ability to travel back in time which is my favorite thing to do! There was a while this feature was bugged but now it’s working great! I would definitely recommend!
Disappinting

reviews.review_title: This is my favorite app!  But…
reviews.review_description:
I can not say any more positive things about this app!  It is great, and probably the one app I use the most next to Beat Saber!  

The controls are easy to handle.  The fact you can jump ANYWHERE Google maps has street view is awesome.  Even the insides of certain buildings are mapped out, and it’s awesome to “walk around” in them. 

You can save places, and organize your book marks however you want with folders, so it’s as organized as you want it to be.

The little house you get is cool, but not really anything to write home about.  It would be cool if you could choose different settings, or locations for your house.

Now, the reason this isn’t a 5 star for me.  Google image spheres does not work.  This is a big thing for me, as there are a TON for you to look at, but you can’t.  You click on the photo sphere, and it looks like it loads, but nothing.

Either way, this app is defy worth the money just for the access to view Google street view in first person.  Check it out!

Great app. Unfortunately I can't see the user created content (blue dots). If that would work, it would be the best app in the store.
But unfortunately it looks like none of the creators care for it anymore, which is annoying, when you paid money for the app.

You can’t click the blue dots anymore and see pics BUT…you can still veiw the locations you have saved in your favorites.
SO if you turn off your darn padlock and meet some new people 
you will find folks who will share oodles and oodles of locations you can save too!
Look for RiverHawkBro (me) , StuTheBlu and Macheesta among others 
who have vast folders of the best locations. Ask around. Social is after all the second best thing about Wander!

reviews.review_title: Updates have been fixed it works again.
reviews.review_description:
Its a great app if like me you like to go Virtual Exploring.
I live a long way from my home town and going to visit means a bit of planning, spare time and cash and this app allows me to visit any time I wish and all for a one off payment.
To be honest I've discovered places in my home town I've never even been to before which has been great and I look forward to visiting those areas in real life next time I go there.
Recent reviews say this is fixed, but user content is still broken for me. I have uninstalled and reinstalled and nothing. No updates pushed either? Anyone able to explain?

It is to work fine but now when I click on user uploaded data (blue dots), nothing happens. That is the only reason I got this app so until it a fixed, this app is useless to me. If it is no longer supported, please let the users know.

reviews.review_title: Best app to see the world
reviews.review_description:
The app is still great. Dont listen to all the complaining about not having access to the blue dots. Yes that would be nice but that doesnt take away from the fact that one can visit most places in the world in 360 VR photos and
 gives you the feeling of being there. I can walk around Paris without a map now because of
 this app. Its extremely user friendly and cost a
 measely $10! I would pay substantially more for this app. I use it every day it's life changing for people who love to travel and sightsee but dont have the time or resources to do so.
Just flat out awsome

When it's working properly it's easily a 5-star. But right now when you click on user uploaded pictures that you haven't previously saved they won't open. If the developers won't fix or update this app it should no longer be sold.

Thank you for fixing the app! Previously the search function, now the user content all fixed! My favorite app ever! I have recommended this to all my friends and had personally gifted a few. I have, no exaggeration - spent hundreds of hours in this app. This is no doubt one of the most value-for-money purchase. The earth is huge and it’s constantly updated so you’ll never run out of content. I couldn’t recommend it more!

The app worked for about the first 3-4 months and the rest of the 12 mi the I’ve been using it, it has some pretty serious glitches. The zoom out doesn’t work and constantly zooms you in on the map to the point where you don’t even know where you are and you definitely cannot explore. I deleted the app from my headset and reinstalled and the problem persisted. I contacted Meta like 2 months ago and they never contacted me back. I loved the app when it was working but is so unenjoyable when it’s not working properly. I say save your money and go with another app. The stress and time you’ll spend trying to troubleshoot and still not find answers is not worth it.

Now, the reason this isn't a 5 star for me. Google image spheres does not work. This is a big thing for me, as there are a TON for you to look at, but you can't. You click on the photo sphere, and it looks like it loads, but nothing.

For anyone thinking about purchasing this once great app. Don't waste your money. Evidently the developers have abandoned it and moat of the content is no longer available.  You can wander around on lonely roads in Jaipur India
 looking at all the poverty and despair,  but you cant go inside the Amber Palace or the famous stepwell( those are all user content no longer available). Very sad but I guess all good things must come to an end
this app used to work, but it doesn’t anymore. You won’t be able to click on even 15% of the places you’ll actually want to visit. Developer appears to have abandoned.￼

Love the app. Getting to explore places i highly doubt i’d ever get to visit in real life. But lately, when i use the map, if i go to zoom in. It gets jumpy. Like i will zoom in then it jumps back further out. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling it numerous times and it still does it. And i dont know how to find out if theres updates for it or not. Is anybody else experiencing this same issue?

reviews.review_title: User Generated photos are not loading
reviews.review_description: Please fix this!!! This is one of the best apps in VR, but lately every time I try to click and user generated bubble, nothing will load! Please update and fix please!!!

I just got the Meta 3 and was wondering if there was a way to see the Louvre. I’ve been in person but would love to sit for hours enjoying it all again. Quick search and Wander popped up as the solution so I purchased and tried it out. Definitely can’t see the Louvre. I did a few other random spots but the quality is so grainy. Just going to return it.

This is my favourite Meta App and I can get lost for hours.

Recently I can't view a lot of the maps.

Cyprus for example doesn't work at when I click anywhere.

I usually use it to plan trips.

I really hope they fix this with an uldate

I absolutely love this app BUT... It needs updating as it's flow n laggy sometimes and also the blue photos don't work anymore??... I've got lots of people buying this app as it's superb fun...please and update the function of it..please..thanks guys
The user uploaded content was my favourite. I have written to the developers and did not get a response. Please bring it back.

Just like a lot of other users here, Wander has stopped working for me. I am unable to search or go to any virtual destination. What was once a wonderful VR experience is now utterly u
seless - please fix!

I like this app except for the removal of older areas locations that were deleted off or lost. Also a couple of my locations disappeared, but I had to look them up again and put them back on my favorite area. ￼￼ the app is well worth it to get an idea of locations that you will be visiting   . ￼
I use this a photo opportunity to Veiw property’s prior to arrival, we are building surveyors

reviews.review_title: Ussr uploaded content is not working
reviews.review_description: I love this app and mostly explored user uploaded content. That has not been working since last 1 week. Only google images of past are showing. Pls fix that ASAP
User content is no longer working and the devs dont seem to respond to all the reviews that state this issue so untill they respond with a fix don't waste your money
I use this app all the time but lately user content doesn’t work. I hope it gets fixed soon. When everything works, it is a 5 star review. Lately, it’s just frustrating.

This was one of the first apps I purchased when I got my Quest 3, and I loved it. I was able to travel to places around the world I had previously visited and discover new places, it was the next best thing to actually being there. As many others have commented, the user content is now unavailable. Many of the paces I had bookmarked can no longer be accessed. I really hope that this can be fixed!

Update on 25/6/25: It looks like there has been an update and you can view user content. However, many of my bookmarks are showing as black and are inaccessible. So the app is still broken.

This App is amazing when it works (five stars). However, the uploaded user content (the blue dots) no longer works, as you cannot view them. Without this feature, this App is useless. I am giving this a one-star rating until this issue is fixed (if it ever is).

I have emailed the developer multiple times but have not received a response. Let’s blow up the developer’s email and force them to fix this glitch (or at least provide an update on what is being done regarding this issue). The email is info@parklineinteractive .com (no space but won’t let me submit review without).

Update 06 25 2025: The issue has been fixed!

Parkline Interactive seriously should or better yet needs to hire a company or someone to do a major User Interface update and add some sort of game, like a GeoGuessr or something to being in new people. This app hasn’t been updated in some time(years) and has basically been abandoned.
They disabled the ability to click on any user content. The app is now total junk. GIVE ME BACK MY MONEY.  I WOULD NEVER HAVE PURCHASED THIS APP IF I KNEW THIS WAS GOING TO HAPPEN.
This Was amazing!! Now you go to the hotspots and nothing! It’s like they haven’t bothered. Roads are fine but those little viewpoints don’t work anymore

reviews.review_title: Easily my favorite app, the best!!!
reviews.review_description: Explore cities and ancient ruins easily with this app, experience the feel or do research before you travel. I love this app, please never stop maintaining this app, you are appreciated creator(s)!
Updating my prior review — devs seem to have gotten user content working, making it a 5-star app once again. It’s terrific.

Updated review:

This is a solid 5-star app with the user uploaded content working beautifully again!!!!!  THANK YOU!!!!!
The only reason I use this app is to go inside buildings with user uploaded content, it’s been months now. Please fix this!
Please fix the app so you can click on the blue dots. I really liked using this app but it's mostly useless now.
I've started to get a  circle of faint but annoying moving dots on the screen is there a reason for these?

I mean it super cool. You can go back in time and just wander around the whole earth. Well, mostly a lot of it but when you try to do user content those little blue dots it doesn’t ever work for some reason. ￼

reviews.review_title: Waste of money, user content broken
reviews.review_description: I want a refund. What made this app valuable is now disabled/broken.
